scripts.build: tsc -p packages/runtime/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/sessions/sqlite/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/environments/local/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/harnesses/codex-cli/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/harnesses/pi/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/harnesses/opencode/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/harnesses/claude-code/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/validators/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/project/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p packages/server/tsconfig.build.json
scripts.verify: bun run clean && bun run typecheck && bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run test && bun run build
